name: Peoples Bank
description_short: Rock Valley, IA's Peoples Bank branch at 1230 Valley Dr provides personal and business banking services for the local community.
description_long:
Peoples Bank has a full-service branch located at 1230 Valley Dr in Rock Valley, IA. This standalone location serves as the main banking hub for Rock Valley residents and surrounding areas, offering standard banking operations.

At this Rock Valley location, customers can access deposit accounts, withdrawal services, loan inquiries, and other personal banking needs. While specific hours and phone contact information may vary, visitors are encouraged to check directly with the branch before traveling.

For Rock Valley residents needing local banking services, this branch provides convenient access to everyday banking. Bring your ID and account information when visiting.
services: Business checking accounts with flexible solutions for small businesses
Online banking platform for account access and management
Physical branch locations with lobby and drive-up services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Specialized agricultural lending focus with dedicated loan products for farming operations
Community bank model emphasizing local relationships and personalized service rather than corporate standardization
Multiple branch locations across Iowa, Minnesota, and South Dakota with extended drive-up hours
Comprehensive service offerings including wealth management, insurance, and business checking solutions
Online and phone banking available for account access and customer support
Customer switching assistance through dedicated Switch Kit program
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to three states (IA, MN, SD) only—no national presence
Website does not disclose specific interest rates, APYs, fees, or minimum deposit requirements for any products
No detailed information provided about credit products, personal loans, or credit card offerings
Limited digital innovation indicators—appears to lack neobank features or modern fintech integrations
Smaller institution means potentially fewer branch locations and ATMs compared to national competitors
best_for: Agricultural operators and farmers seeking specialized ag lending in the Upper Midwest
Small business owners in Iowa, Minnesota, and South Dakota prioritizing local banking relationships
Rural and small-town families seeking community-based banking with personalized service
Customers relocating to or already established in the bank's three-state service area
diagnosis: Peoples Bank is best for agricultural operators, small business owners, and families in Iowa, Minnesota, and South Dakota who value community banking relationships and local decision-making over national convenience. The primary caveat is that the bank's geographic limitations and lack of disclosed pricing and product details on their website make it unsuitable for customers outside their service area or those needing transparent rate and fee comparisons before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Rock Valley, IA's Peoples Bank branch at 1230 Valley Dr offers deposit accounts and personal banking services.
